title: Gauge Chart
description: A gauge chart component for visualizing progress, metrics, and KPIs with customizable thresholds, animations, and responsive design.

showcase.title: Gauge Chart Showcase
showcase.description: Gauge chart demonstrating various features and configurations

sections.title: Basic Usage
sections.description: Simple gauge chart with basic configuration and thresholds

sections.title: Threshold Configuration
sections.description: Gauge chart with custom threshold ranges and color indicators

sections.title: Animation Effects
sections.description: Gauge chart with custom animation duration and easing

sections.title: Custom Styling
sections.description: Gauge chart with custom styling options and visual appearance

sections.title: Size Variations
sections.description: Gauge charts in different sizes for various use cases

types.title: AXGaugeChartComponent
types.description: Gauge Chart Component - Gauge chart for visualizing progress, metrics, or KPIs with threshold ranges

methods.name: createChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Creates the gauge chart with all elements
 */
createChart(): void

methods.name: updateChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Updates the chart when options change
 */
updateChart(): void

methods.name: updateValueAndDial
methods.content:
/**
 * Updates only the value display and dial position without recreating the chart
 */
updateValueAndDial(value: number): void

methods.name: cleanupChart
methods.content:
/**
 * Cleans up chart resources
 */
cleanupChart(): void

tokens.name: --ax-comp-gauge-chart-bg-color
tokens.description: Background color for the chart area

tokens.name: --ax-comp-gauge-chart-text-color
tokens.description: Text color for all labels, values, and indicators

tokens.name: --ax-comp-gauge-chart-track-color
tokens.description: Color for the gauge track (background arc)

tokens.name: --ax-comp-gauge-chart-needle-color
tokens.description: Color for the gauge needle indicator

types.title: AX_GAUGE_CHART_CONFIG
types.description: Default configuration token providing effective AXGaugeChartOption values

props.name: gaugeWidth
props.description: Width of the gauge arc in pixels

props.name: cornerRadius
props.description: Radius of gauge arc corners in pixels

props.name: showValue
props.description: Whether to show the current value

props.name: showTooltip
props.description: Whether to show tooltip on hover

props.name: animationDuration
props.description: Duration of the animation in ms
